query:
(_index=sumologic_audit_events _sourcecategory=cseinsight insightupdated) 
| json field=_raw "insight.signals[*].ruleId", "insight.tags",  "insight.created", "eventTime", "insight.timeToResponse", "insight.timeToDetection" ,"insight.timeToRemediation","insight.assignee", "operator.email",  "insight.status", "insight.resolution", "insight.severity", "insight.closed", "insight.source" , "insight.entityValue","insight.entityType", "insight.entityId", "insight.description",  "insight.name", "insight.readableId", "insight.id", "insight.confidence"   as insight_ruleId, insight_tags, insight_createdAt, insight_event_time, insight_time_to_response , insight_time_to_detection, insight_time_to_remediation , insight_assignee , operator_email, insight_status, insight_resolution, insight_severity, insight_closedAt, insight_source, entity_value, entity_type, entity_id, insight_description, insight_name, insight_readableId, insight_Id, insight_confidence nodrop
| where insight_status = "closed"
| insight_confidence * 100 as insight_confidence 
| json field=_raw "insight.signals.length()" as signal_count
| replace(insight_tags, "[","") as insight_tags
| replace(insight_tags, "]","") as insight_tags
| replace(insight_tags, "\"","") as insight_tags
| replace(insight_tags, ","," | ") as insight_tags
| replace(insight_ruleId, "[","") as insight_ruleId
| replace(insight_ruleId, "]","") as insight_ruleId
| replace(insight_ruleId, "\"","") as insight_ruleId
| replace(insight_ruleId, ","," | ") as insight_ruleId

| if(IsEmpty(insight_time_to_remediation), 0, insight_time_to_remediation) as insight_time_to_remediation

| floor(insight_time_to_remediation/60/60/24) as insight_time_to_remediation_days
| insight_time_to_remediation - (insight_time_to_remediation_days*24*60*60) as insight_time_to_remediation

| floor(insight_time_to_remediation/60/60) as insight_time_to_remediation_hours
| insight_time_to_remediation - (insight_time_to_remediation_hours*60*60) as insight_time_to_remediation

| floor(insight_time_to_remediation/60) as insight_time_to_remediation_minutes
| insight_time_to_remediation - (insight_time_to_remediation_minutes*60) as insight_time_to_remediation

| floor(insight_time_to_remediation) as insight_time_to_remediation_seconds

| format("%s Days, %s Hrs, %s Min, %s Sec", ToInt(insight_time_to_remediation_days), ToInt(insight_time_to_remediation_hours), ToInt(insight_time_to_remediation_minutes), ToInt(insight_time_to_remediation_seconds)) as insight_time_to_remediation


| count by insight_closedAt, insight_id,signal_count, insight_confidence, insight_severity,insight_description, insight_name, insight_assignee ,insight_ruleId, insight_tags, insight_time_to_remediation, entity_value, entity_type
| sort by insight_confidence desc
| fields - _count
| limit 10

sources.dashboardDescription: This dashboard provides summary of Insights with created vs closed trend.
sources.panelTitle: Top 10 Closed Insights by Confidence Level
